findings.description: TEMPLATE_PATH const baked developer machine absolute path (/home/matthew/nexcore/templates/adventure-hud.true) into source code. Path also referenced old location before repo move. nex://adventure page always silently fails on any other machine.
find_closing_brace used .find('}') which returns the first } in the slice — not the structurally matching } for the opening brace. Any nested JSON object causes silent data truncation.
InternalRenderer::viewport() returned hardcoded 1280x720 regardless of actual window size. Browser resizes were invisible to ContentRenderer consumers.
Visual regression harness hardcoded /home/matthew/nexcore/target/debug/nexbrowser — wrong path after repo move and non-portable across machines. Script silently exited without running any tests.
Message::IntegrateLearning was defined and matched but fell through to Effect::None — external learnings were silently discarded without updating the GROUNDED loop context.
use std::sync::mpsc imported but never referenced in the file. Synchronization uses Mutex+Condvar directly.
HashMap<fontdb::ID, CachedFont> used for font_cache. Workspace clippy.toml bans HashMap in favor of BTreeMap for deterministic iteration. fontdb::ID derives Ord so BTreeMap works directly.
HashMap<String, CacheEntry> and HashMap<String, u32> used for ImageCache entries and failed URL tracking. Replaced with BTreeMap.
HashMap used for Rule::declarations. Also propagated to style/selector.rs, style/cascade.rs (test helpers), and dom/mod.rs (element attrs). All replaced with BTreeMap.
std::collections::HashSet used for deduplication in collect_image_urls. Replaced with BTreeSet.
Stale per-crate Cargo.lock present in workspace member. Crate is included via workspace glob (crates/*) so workspace root Cargo.lock governs. Orphan lock file was source of confusion.
